settings.heroTitle: All Your Digital Needs, In One Sharp Place.
settings.heroLead: We craft fast websites, web apps, ecommerce experiences, and search-ready digital systems that help businesses look premium and win better leads.
settings.teamLeadBio: Leads project direction, client strategy, and launch quality from the first idea to the live website.

services.title: Website Design
services.summary: Modern, responsive business websites with premium visuals, clear conversion paths, and mobile-first polish.

services.title: Web Applications
services.summary: Custom dashboards, booking flows, private portals, and tools built around your real workflow.

services.title: E-Commerce
services.summary: Stores that make products easy to browse, buy, manage, and promote across your online channels.

services.title: SEO Foundations
services.summary: Technical SEO, metadata, content structure, performance, and local search setup for stronger discoverability.

services.title: Brand & Creative
services.summary: Visual systems, social media assets, content layouts, and brand consistency for digital campaigns.

services.title: Care Plans
services.summary: Maintenance, updates, security checks, backups, and continuous improvements after launch.

process.title: Discover
process.text: We map your goals, audience, offer, content, and conversion path before design starts.

process.title: Design
process.text: We create a clean, brand-aligned interface with the right visual energy and simple navigation.

process.title: Build
process.text: We develop responsive pages, backend features, owner tools, forms, and integrations.

process.title: Launch
process.text: We test performance, mobile views, contact flows, SEO basics, and hand over a maintainable system.

projects.name: BlueWave Stores
projects.summary: A sleek product catalogue and order enquiry flow for a retail business moving online.

projects.name: Avenor Labs
projects.summary: A technical service website with strong positioning, fast content sections, and SEO-ready pages.

projects.name: CeylonVista Travel
projects.summary: A tour discovery experience with inquiry routing, WhatsApp actions, and package highlights.

testimonials.name: Naveen Perera
testimonials.quote: Sitesnap made the whole website process easy. The final design felt premium and customers started contacting us through WhatsApp immediately.

testimonials.name: Ashini Silva
testimonials.quote: The private dashboard saved us time from day one. We can track enquiries and keep our content fresh without calling a developer every time.

faqs.question: How long does a business website take?
faqs.answer: Most small business websites take 7 to 14 days after content and direction are confirmed. Larger websites and web apps are planned in milestones.

faqs.question: Can you build backend dashboards?
faqs.answer: Yes. We can build private dashboards for leads, services, projects, content, users, orders, or any workflow your business needs.

faqs.question: Do you support WhatsApp enquiries?
faqs.answer: Yes. We can connect phone calls, WhatsApp, contact forms, email notifications, and CRM-ready lead storage.

faqs.question: Will the website work on mobile?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every Sitesnap website is designed mobile-first and checked across common screen sizes before launch.

inquiries.name: Sample Lead
inquiries.message: I need a new website with WhatsApp enquiries and SEO basics.
